text:
Voucher 引き換え券 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots".
__NOTOC__

|align=center colspan="3"|A special voucher which transforms into the card Angel Breath once one becomes available.

Summary

Voucher 引き換え券 - This card is given to a player who has fulfilled the requirements to obtain an Angel's Breath card, but its maximum transformation limit has been reached. When a new slot becomes available, this card will transform into a Breath of Archangel.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.1000 :: 引き換え券 
「大天使の息吹」と交換することができる券。「大天使の息吹」のカード化限度枚数がMAXの時にのみ手に入れることができる。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1000 :: Voucher 
A ticket that can be exchanged with a "Breath of Archangel". This is only obtained when the maximum transform limit for Breath of Archangel has been reached.
|}

Trivia

Bisky failed to use a 'Cloned' copy of Breath of Archangel because Goreinu's vouchers converted to real ones.
